tools.label: GitHub
tools.use_for: Repository readiness, similar projects, implementation proof, README quality, and activity signals.
tools.decision: First-wave read connector; use public access before asking for a token.

tools.label: YC Library and Startup School
tools.use_for: Customer discovery, MVP discipline, launch basics, and founder operating guidance.
tools.decision: Enable as default startup framework source.

tools.label: garrytan/gstack
tools.use_for: Founder/operator skill-pack reference and specialist-role workflow patterns.
tools.decision: Use as inspiration/source, not as a dependency.

tools.label: Devpost
tools.use_for: Public project examples, submission fields, prizes, judging criteria, and demo patterns.
tools.decision: Generate drafts and comparisons; do not auto-submit.

tools.label: Major League Hacking
tools.use_for: Beginner hackathon expectations, organizer patterns, and rules.
tools.decision: Use as rules/workflow reference.

tools.label: Lablab.ai
tools.use_for: AI hackathon examples, AI/ML challenge patterns, and provider-driven project ideas.
tools.decision: Use public pages first; provider APIs are optional.

tools.label: Kaggle
tools.use_for: Datasets, notebooks, competitions, and ML benchmark examples.
tools.decision: Optional data/ML connector; read-only first.

tools.label: Hugging Face
tools.use_for: Models, datasets, Spaces, demos, and AI project examples.
tools.decision: Optional connector; prefer read token.

tools.label: OpenAI
tools.use_for: LLM review, idea synthesis, pitch feedback, and AI app provider option.
tools.decision: Platform-owned first; BYOK optional for local/open-source usage.

tools.label: Anthropic
tools.use_for: Provider-agnostic review, writing, and reasoning workflows.
tools.decision: Platform-owned first; BYOK optional.

tools.label: Google Gemini
tools.use_for: Gemini ecosystem app planning, multimodal workflows, and provider comparison.
tools.decision: Optional provider adapter.

tools.label: Vercel
tools.use_for: Deployment checklist, preview URL verification, and web app demo readiness.
tools.decision: Add later for deployment checks; verify public URL first.

tools.label: Supabase
tools.use_for: Fast prototype stack recommendation: Postgres, auth, storage, and realtime.
tools.decision: Treat service role as high risk; never expose secret keys.

tools.label: Cloudflare
tools.use_for: Workers, D1, R2, Workers AI, and edge app planning.
tools.decision: Optional connector with scoped tokens.

tools.label: solana.new
tools.use_for: Solana starter templates and scaffold discovery.
tools.decision: Use as scaffold recommendation, not as execution connector.

tools.label: Colosseum Copilot
tools.use_for: Solana project archive search, winner analysis, project gap analysis, and differentiation.
tools.decision: Optional read connector for Solana project research.

tools.label: ETHGlobal Skills
tools.use_for: Ethereum hackathon project corpus, sponsor docs, bounties, and winner patterns.
tools.decision: Use as public intelligence connector with strict rate limits.

tools.label: Scaffold-ETH 2
tools.use_for: EVM dapp scaffold, build path, and learning workflow.
tools.decision: Use for planning; defer deploy automation.

tools.label: Base Skills / OnchainKit
tools.use_for: Base app patterns, onchain UX, and Coinbase ecosystem stack options.
tools.decision: Use for guidance first; app integrations may need CDP credentials.

tools.label: Coinbase AgentKit
tools.use_for: Future agentic wallet and onchain actions.
tools.decision: Defer until permission gates and sandbox wallets exist.

tools.label: Solana Agent Kit
tools.use_for: Future Solana action workflows, wallet/RPC/plugin paths.
tools.decision: Defer execution until wallet policy exists.

tools.label: OpenZeppelin Skills
tools.use_for: Smart contract security, contracts, and readiness practices.
tools.decision: Enable by default for security readiness.

tools.label: Trail of Bits Skills
tools.use_for: Security review procedures and local analysis guidance.
tools.decision: Enable as optional security review guidance.

tools.label: BNB Ask AI MCP
tools.use_for: Read-only BNB Chain docs and ecosystem knowledge.
tools.decision: Enable by default if MCP availability is stable.

tools.label: BNBChain MCP
tools.use_for: BNB read/write chain operations.
tools.decision: Defer write actions; use read-only docs path first.

tools.label: TON Blueprint / TON Connect
tools.use_for: TON scaffold, tests, deployment planning, and wallet connection UX.
tools.decision: Use for guidance; avoid mnemonic storage.
